sections.sectionTitle: Topa pen Tuucin' bangin Hong Cingpa

verses.text: Topa pen tuucin' bangin hong cing hi a, kisapna teng kicing ta hi
Lo nona-ah hong lumsak a, tuidam kiangah hong paipih hi
Thahatna thak kei hong guan' hi. A hong ciamsa mah bangin-ah lampi manah kei hong kha hi
Topa aw, kei hong ompih na hih manin khuamial thukpi ka nawk hangin ka lau kei hi. Na molhtum leh na ciangkhut in kei hong hu hi
Keima galte' muhna munah an nong lui hi. Thupi takin nong pahtawi a, keima hai zong dimlet ta hi
Na hoihna leh nong itna in ka khan'tawnin a hong zuih ding tel takin-ah ka thei ta a, a tawntungin na inn sungah ka om ding hi.
